items.headline: Arsenal opens up 6-point lead in Premier League title race to pile pressure on Man City
items.description:
All of a sudden, Arsenal has a six-point lead in the Premier League.
Over to you, Manchester City.

items.headline: Arsenal hit stride to go six points clear, West Ham loss offers Spurs hope
items.description: Arsenal stormed six points clear at the top of the Premier League as Bukayo Saka and Viktor Gyokeres put Fulham to the sword in a 3-0 win, while West Ham's defeat at Brentford offered Tottenham...

items.headline: Clinical Chennai down Mumbai to keep playoff hopes alive

items.headline: Arsenal go six points clear as Gyokeres double sinks Fulham

items.headline: PSG fringe team held by Lorient as Bayern Munich return leg looms
items.description: Paris Saint-Germain warmed up for the second leg of their Champions League semi-final against Bayern Munich by fielding a second-string line-up and throwing away the lead twice in a 2-2 draw...
